title: Horizontal Card Light
description: Light ATI styling for reusable horizontal cards.

styles.css: &{overflow:hidden;transition:box-shadow 300ms ease;} &:hover{box-shadow:var(--wp--preset--shadow--300)!important;} & .horizontal-card__body{padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);} & .horizontal-card__details{border-top-style:none;border-top-width:0;border-bottom-style:none;border-bottom-width:0;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--0);} & .wp-block-cover,& .wp-block-post-featured-image{overflow:hidden;} & .wp-block-cover .wp-block-cover__image-background,& .wp-block-post-featured-image img{transition:transform 300ms ease;} &:hover .wp-block-cover .wp-block-cover__image-background,&:hover .wp-block-post-featured-image img{transform:scale(1.05);} & .wp-block-outermost-icon-block svg{fill:currentColor!important;} & .wp-block-button__link:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--wp--preset--color--accent-500);outline-offset:2px;}
